Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Continued To Apr-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2009 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Andrew H. Meisel, Esq. appeared with petitioner Elaine Fong, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Anna Fong, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Anna W. Wong was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $730,000.00.
Attorney's Fees -$168,893.25.
Medical Expenses - $24,930.00.
Costs - $54,426.98.

A net balance of $481,706.77 shall be distributed as follows: $56,706.77 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 944 Stockton, Street, San Francisco, CA 94108. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

The remaining $425,000.00 shall be as directed by Cambridge Calaher in the release to fund the Structured Settlement described in attachment 12 of the Petition, and as attached as Exhibit A to the Order to Approve the Compromise.

Orders Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
